B1_BASIN.name: Basin Commitment
B1_BASIN.description: Scalar boundary on energy or effort required to transition between macro-states.

B2_EXPRESSION.name: Expression Capacity
B2_EXPRESSION.description: Volumetric boundary bounding total combinatorially resolvable states.

B3_COORDINATION.name: Coordination Complexity
B3_COORDINATION.description: Graph matrix limitation tracking the depth of required multi-agent coupling to effect change.

B4_SYMBOLIC_DEPTH.name: Symbolic Depth
B4_SYMBOLIC_DEPTH.description: Limits on referential abstraction logic layers before execution recursion saturates.
B4_SYMBOLIC_DEPTH.topological_proxy: Policy stack depth / Abstraction pointer nesting
